verdict_summary: Mistral message.newChat baseline FULLY captured via L-049 Method (c) Console fetch replay (914 bytes, status 200, JSONL streaming superjson envelope). V5-A 992B template likely has wrong envelope STRUCTURE (single-line vs 4-line indexed superjson) and is missing canvas/contentChunks/turn/agentsApiAgentId/isAcceleratedAnswer/moderationCategory/reaction/memories/versionCount/visibility/quotedContent/workflowExecution/generationStatus + meta.values Date sentinel.

evidence.method_used: L-049 Method (c) DevTools Console fetch+ReadableStream replay (used response.text() since network Response tab returned 'Failed to load response data' for streaming jsonl)
v5a_likely_missing_fields: envelope STRUCTURE — must be 4-line JSONL with indexed superjson references (NOT inline single JSON)
meta.values type-hint sentinel for createdAt: '2.0.0.messages.createdAt': ['Date'] (superjson Date hydration — likely THE undefined/null source)
content is PLAIN STRING in response (request uses parts[], response flattens to string)

key_findings: ROOT CAUSE candidate #1: Response envelope is 4-line JSONL with superjson INDEX-REFERENCE encoding — V5-A 992B likely emits single-line JSON which breaks tRPC's superjson dehydration walker.

ROOT CAUSE candidate #2: meta.values must contain '2.0.0.messages.createdAt': ['Date'] sentinel — when superjson tries to walk this path on V5-A response and hits undefined, it fails with 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object'.
Schema field count: 29 fields in message object (V5-A 11 added fields likely insufficient — diff ~18 fields).
Empty arrays MUST be [] not null: followups, files, canvas — null would also trigger the same error if client does .map() on them.
content field is plain STRING in response (NOT parts[] array as in request) — request/response asymmetry.
Anonymous-user mode works (no login required) — same envelope structure applies.
notes: Captured at chat.mistral.ai/api/trpc/message.newChat?batch=1 via L-049(c) Console fetch replay with ReadableStream→text(). Status 200, 914 bytes, JSONL/superjson stream format. Network Response tab showed 'Failed to load response data' (streaming bodies not cached by DevTools), forcing the Console replay path — exactly matches the L-049 Method (c) playbook. Anonymous guest user (anonymousUser cookie set automatically). Both the prior '안녕하세요' real submission and the replay 'hello there' returned identical envelope structure. V5-A diff focus: envelope line-count + meta.values Date sentinel are the highest-probability undefined-or-null sources.
